scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('../../version.json', 'src/app/version.json'); fs.copyFileSync('../../version.json', 'src/app/admin/version.json'); fs.copyFileSync('../../version.json', 'src/app/vendor/version.json'); fs.copyFileSync('../../version.json', 'src/app/delivery/version.json');"
scripts.predev: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('../../version.json', 'src/app/version.json'); fs.copyFileSync('../../version.json', 'src/app/admin/version.json'); fs.copyFileSync('../../version.json', 'src/app/vendor/version.json'); fs.copyFileSync('../../version.json', 'src/app/delivery/version.json');"
